---
title: Phonetic Tools
author: Hywel Stoakes
date: '2019-01-23'
slug: phonetic-tools
categories:
  - Phonetics
tags:
  - Phonetics
header:
  caption: '© The International Phonetic Association'
  image: 'header/ipapulmonics.png'
---

- A great clickable IPA chart on that site that shows MRI, Ultrasound and some animations of the different speech sounds defined by the IPA ([IPA Chart](https://www.seeingspeech.ac.uk/ipa-charts/)).
